main.description: Overrides the site nav menu (the dock sheet). A singleton at at://{me}/is.dame.nav/self. When `enabled`, `items` replace the site's hardcoded route list — letting you select, reorder, relabel, and hide entries. When `enabled` is false (or no record exists), the site falls back to its built-in routes (see src/lib/navRoutes.js).

enabled.description: Whether this record drives the nav menu. False = use the hardcoded routes.

items.description: Ordered nav entries. Order here is the order shown.

hidden.description: Keep the entry in the list but hide it from the menu.
